description_long: This is a tan-colored felt hat with a wide, flat brim and a medium-height crown featuring a distinct pinched front crease. The hat is adorned with a subtle, matching hatband that wraps around the base of the crown and is tied in a simple knot on one side. The brim is broad and even, providing ample shade and a classic silhouette. The crown has a gentle taper and a smooth, slightly domed profile, with the front pinch giving it a structured, stylish appearance. The overall finish is matte, with a soft, slightly textured surface typical of wool or felt hats. There are no visible logos or decorative embellishments beyond the hatband.
description: A tan felt hat with a wide, flat brim, pinched crown, and a simple matching hatband tied at the side. The surface is matte and softly textured.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pinched crown and the hatband knot on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wide, flat brim and the full length of the hatband tied at the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back of the crown and the continuous brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the hatband knot less visible and the crown's gentle taper evident.
attribute_crown_shape: medium height with pinched front and gentle taper
